allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./src/blueprint/schema.js'\).then\(m => { const r = m.BlueprintSchema.safeParse\(m.getFallbackBlueprint\('Test Site', 'en'\)\); console.log\('fallback valid:', r.success\); if\(!r.success\) console.log\(r.error.issues\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>s+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const a=JSON.parse\(s\);const withNames=a.filter\(p=>p.name_en||p.name_ar\);console.log\('blueprint projects with bilingual names:',withNames.length\);withNames.forEach\(p=>console.log\('  -',p.name,'| en:',p.name_en,'| ar:',p.name_ar\)\);}\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; "stopped old backend")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5000/api/blueprint/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Authorization: Bearer __TRACKED_VAR__' -d '{"prompt":"عيادة أسنان حديثة في الرياض مع حجز مواعيد","language":"ar"}')
